title: ononis monophylla var. tuna
intro: Ononis monophylla var. tuna, also known as the wild kidney bean or tuna bean, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, this plant has been valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Ononis monophylla var. tuna include its potential to support kidney function, lower blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosage.
